title: Bridge Paper: Interoceptive Inception in Insula.
author: Frontier Science / Hermes T2

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Interoception — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, insula, vagal signaling, felt aliveness.
**Phase context:** interoception, interoceptive, heart-brain, vagal, insula, cardiorespiratory, breathing entrainment

Paper: Interoceptive Inception in Insula.
DOI: 10.1016/j.neuron.2020.02.032
Abstract: The neural mechanisms underlying interoception-the sensation of internal physiological states-remain largely unresolved. In this issue of Neuron, Livneh et al. (2020) demonstrate that the insula bridges different timescales of interoception by tracking and predicting thirst and hunger states.
